Entries.{{ModId}}_AbbyOrchi1: I'm really nervous, but also really, really excited.$h#$e#I wonder if they'll let me keep them in a jar...$0.
Entries.eventSeen_{{ModId}}_NighttimeSwimming_10: *blushes* I had a really nice time with you last night.$l#$e#We should do it again sometime...$l
Entries.fishCaught_128: Hey, @, I heard you caught a pufferfish.$h#$b#I just think they're neat.$h
Entries.cc_Bridge_memory_oneday: I saw that that bridge across the lake got fixed.#$b#I heard that guy with the eyepatch talking about some really dangerous cave over there.#$b#I'm curious...
Entries.questComplete_18: I heard you reached the bottom of the mines, @.#$b#$query PLAYER_FRIENDSHIP_POINTS Current Abigail 2000#You're so h- COOL!$l#$b#You're so cool...$l|You're so cool!$h
Entries.questComplete_108: Mom says you gave her the pumpkin we carved.#$e#Thanks!$h
Entries.questComplete_128_memory_oneweek: Thanks again for finding mom's necklace, @.#$b#Wait, you didn't tell her I lost it, right?
Entries.firstVisit_WizardHouseBasement: Did you find any sort of transforming magic recently, @?#$e#Huh, why do I ask?#$b#Um... no reason...
Entries.eventSeen_{{ModId}}_TidePools_5h_memory_: Did you find anything cool on the beach recently?

Entries.Introduction: Hello! You must be @, the new farmer. I'm Caroline.#$e#My husband runs the general store here. And have you met my daughter, Abigail? {{AbbyPronoun_Contraction_IsAre}} the pale one with the purple hair.
Entries.dating_Abigail_memory_oneday: Abby told me that you and {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Objective}}}} are seeing each other. That's sweet!
Entries.Mon8: #$1 Caroline23#When we first moved to Pelican Town I would take secret walks to the Wizard's tower. Don't tell Pierre, he has jealousy issues.#$e#Abigail was born about a year after we moved to Pelican Town. I wonder if {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Subjective}}}}'ll ever experience life outside the valley?
Entries.Sat_inlaw_Abigail: Dinner's been a lot quieter since Abigail moved out...#$e#No, not because {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Subjective}}}} used to chew with {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Possessive}}}} mouth open!$h
Entries.summer_Sat: Is it just me, or does Abigail look a little pale?#$e#Maybe I'm just worrying about {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Objective}}}} too much.
Entries.summer_Sat_inlaw_Abigail: How's Abigail's health? {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_ContractionHasHave}}}} always been such a pale girl. Hopefully the farm lifestyle puts a little color in {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Possessive}}}} cheeks.
Entries.fall_Mon_inlaw_Abigail: Abby was taking online classes here, but I don't think {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Possessive}}}} heart was really in it...#$e#{{AbbyPronoun_Contraction_IsAre}} a free spirit, like I was before I met Pierre. {{AbbyPronoun_Contraction_IsAre}} probably having the time of {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Possessive}}}} life on your farm.
Entries.Mon: I wish Abby wouldn't spend so much time in {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Possessive}}}} room.
Entries.Sat2: Abby's always had a strange interest in the occult. I'm not sure where {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Subjective}}}} gets it from...
Entries.fall_Mon: Fall is Abby's favorite season, so I'm hoping {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Subjective}}}}'ll come out of her room more often.
Entries.winter_Sat: Don't you think Abby would look better with {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Possessive}}}} natural hair color?#$e#{{AbbyPronoun_Subjective}} used to have light chestnut-colored hair.

Entries.eventSeen_4: Abigail's going through a rebellious phase... I get it.#$e#{{AbbyPronoun_Subjective}}'ll wise up when {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_HasHave}}}} to make {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Possessive}}}} first mortgage payment!$h
Entries.Mon4_inlaw_Abigail: Hi, @. How's Abigail doing? The shop hasn't been the same without {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_Objective}}}}...

Entries.eventSeen_{{ModId}}_AbigailComingOut_mem: When I grow up, I wanna become a girl like Abigail!$h

Entries.Caroline_like_AfterMovie: That wasn't bad! I'll have to ask Abigail about it when I'm home, I'm sure {{Lowercase: {{AbbyPronoun_ContractionHasHave}}}} seen it.$h
